name: Tekklar Legion
text: At the start of an invasion combat: Apply +2 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls during this combat. Then, return this card to the N'orr player.

name: Trade Convoys
text: ACTION: Place this card faceup in your play area. While this card is in your play area, you may negotiate transactions with players who are not your neighbour. When a transaction with a non-neighbour is completed, the Hacan player may gain 1 commodity or convert 1 commodity to a trade good. If you activate a system that contains 1 or more of the Hacan player's units, return this card to the Hacan player.

name: Political Favor
text: When an agenda is revealed: Discard the revealed agenda and reveal 1 agenda from the top of the deck.  Players vote on this agenda instead. The Xxcha player gains 5 additional votes for that agenda.
